response.original_title: Il teatro di Mattia Torre : In mezzo al mare
response.overview: Aurelia. 3:30 in the morning. On the way home from a wedding. A man witnesses an accident, and now, months later, he is called upon to “explain himself” before a judge. But testifying requires knowledge of the facts of the case, and he finds this difficult. Because in an age when everything must be clear, he is at the mercy of the waves.
response.title: Il teatro di Mattia Torre : In mezzo al mare
